name: SimpleFIN Sync
description: Sync investment holdings from SimpleFIN Bridge into Wealthfolio as dated holdings snapshots, for automatic asset-allocation tracking.
author: Michael Griscom

permissions.purpose: Securely store your SimpleFIN access URL and account mapping in the system keyring.
List your Wealthfolio accounts so SimpleFIN accounts can be mapped to them.
Write current holdings and cash balances as dated snapshots to HOLDINGS-mode accounts.
Add a SimpleFIN Sync page to the sidebar.
